overview: FileVault is a secure file-sharing platform where users upload files and get unique, non-guessable download links. Features include expiry dates, QR code sharing, file renaming, admin controls, and global statistics.
features: Secure file uploads with unique download tokens
Optional expiry dates for uploaded files
QR code sharing for download links
Inline file renaming for owners and admins
Super-admin panel with full file visibility
Global statistics: file count, storage, downloads
Automatic download on public link visit
